name: Spiced Vanilla Pecans
recipeInstructions:
DAY 1: In a large saucepan, bring the pecans to a boil in water for 1 minute. Remove well from the heat. Toss them with sugar, melted butter, corn syrup and vanilla extract. Mix thoroughly and let stand, covered, at least 12 hours up to 24.
DAY 2: Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Spread nuts on a rimmed cookie sheet. Bake for 30 minutes, stirring every 5 minutes until well browned and crisp-looking. Remove from the oven; immediately toss with spices, tossing until evenly coated. Return nuts to the cookie sheet in a single layer and allow to cool completely before storing airtight.
Makes 1 pound.
